title: Remove all Share on X (Twitter) links and buttons from paper detail page
description:
Remove every 'Share on X', 'Share on Twitter', or twitter.com/intent/tweet link/button from this file. This includes any <a> tags linking to twitter.com or x.com for sharing purposes, any buttons labeled 'Twitter' or 'X' in share sections, and any associated icons (the X/Twitter bird SVG). Remove the entire link/button element, not just the text. If removing a share button leaves an empty share section or an orphaned separator/divider, clean that up too.

Do NOT remove Twitter meta tags (twitter:card, twitter:title, etc.) from the Layout — those are for link previews, not share buttons.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.
